It sits 183 km from Saskatoon in Viking-formation oil and gas, wheat farming and Lake Diefenbaker irrigation country. Motherwell Reservoir lies about 5.5 km away. The municipality (Kindersley No. 290) spreads across farmland near Rosetown and Biggar.
